title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
